MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party Martin Moore
No other appearances.

RULING:
Plaintiffs' counsel's motion to be relieved from their representation of Martin Moore. Off the record Mr. Noah informed the Court regarding the attorney-client relationship. On the record the Court determined that good cause was established and granted counsel's motion to be relieved. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Continued To Feb-04-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 220
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James P. Nevin, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party MARTIN MOORE
No other appearances.

RULING:
Nancy T. Williams, Brayton <> Purcell's Motion to withdraw as attorney of record for plaintiff MARTIN MOORE. Upon request by counsel the motion FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is ordered continued to February 4, 2010 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 220. Counsel is to notify Mr. Moore of the hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
